title: Raccoon Removal in Brooklyn Heights | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Brooklyn Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, humane trapping and exclusion services for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Brooklyn Heights residents face unique raccoon challenges due to the neighborhood's historic brownstones, tree-lined streets, and proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park. Our professional raccoon removal services protect your property from these intelligent and persistent wildlife invaders. We provide humane trapping, exclusion, and cleanup services tailored to Brooklyn Heights' distinctive architecture.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in raccoon removal for Brooklyn Heights' historic homes and landmark buildings, using humane methods that comply with local wildlife regulations. Our experienced technicians understand the unique entry points in century-old brownstones and modern condos alike, providing lasting solutions with minimal disruption to your property.
localContext: Brooklyn Heights' mature trees along the Promenade and quiet residential streets create ideal raccoon habitats, while the neighborhood's older brownstones and row houses offer numerous access points through chimneys, roof eaves, and foundation gaps. The area's proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park and the waterfront attracts raccoons seeking food and shelter in attics, crawl spaces, and between walls.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Brooklyn Heights typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access difficulty, and necessary repairs. Historic brownstones may require specialized exclusion work that affects pricing. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: Brooklyn Heights offers raccoons ideal conditions with its mature trees, proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park, and abundance of food sources from residential garbage and outdoor dining areas. The neighborhood's historic brownstones and older buildings provide numerous entry points through chimneys, roof gaps, and deteriorated vents that raccoons exploit for nesting sites.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Brooklyn Heights residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose health and safety risks. They may carry rabies, raccoon roundworm, and other diseases transmissible to humans and pets. Raccoons can also cause significant property damage by tearing insulation, chewing wiring, damaging roofs, and creating unsanitary conditions with their waste. They may become aggressive if cornered, especially when protecting their young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Brooklyn Heights property?
faqs.answer: Most raccoon removal projects in Brooklyn Heights are completed within 3-10 days, depending on the number of animals and complexity of the situation. Initial trapping typically takes 2-5 days, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent re-entry. We offer emergency same-day inspections for urgent situations and work efficiently to restore your peace of mind.
